title: selaginella arthritica
intro: Selaginella arthritica, also known as spiny spleenwort, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, and aiding in the treatment of conditions like arthritis, bronchitis, and fever. Selaginella arthritica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
